code_path_added.location: Bridge loop — immediately before check_entry_gates() call, after LATE_INNING_BLOCK pre-gate check
code_path_added.approach: Pre-gate check in bot_core.py (same pattern as LATE_INNING_BLOCK). Chose this over adding to risk.py to avoid adding DB coupling to the risk waterfall for a session-level concern.
code_path_added.gate_logic: If MAX_SLUG_ENTRIES_SESSION > 0: query trades DB for COUNT(*) WHERE market_slug=? AND date(ts_open) >= date('now', 'localtime'). If count >= cap, emit BRIDGE GATE REJECT and continue.
code_path_added.db_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trades WHERE market_slug = ? AND date(ts_open) >= date('now', 'localtime')
code_path_added.count_includes: Both open and closed trades for today (no status filter — query counts all rows for slug on today's date)

env_changes.MAX_SLUG_ENTRIES_SESSION: 3 — added to .env in Risk / position sizing section alongside MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES and MAX_TRADES_PER_MARKET

verification_performed: Confirmed DB column market_slug and ts_open exist in trades table (core/db.py lines 25, 23)
Confirmed DB_PATH module-level constant used in query (not re-read from env inside check)
Confirmed guard is additive — does not change MAX_TRADES_PER_MARKET behavior
Confirmed count includes open + closed trades (no WHERE status filter)
Confirmed rejection log matches BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] format as required
restart_needed: Yes — MAX_SLUG_ENTRIES_SESSION must be loaded on restart. Also pyc cache must be cleared to pick up all prior patches.
observed: risk.py was not modified — the check is implemented in bot_core.py pre-gate, consistent with LATE_INNING_BLOCK pattern.

The DB query uses date('now', 'localtime') — matches the intent of 'today's session'. If operator runs sessions across midnight, trades from before midnight will not count toward today's cap, which is correct.
DB_PATH is defined at module level in bot_core.py and is available at the call site.
proven: After 3 total entries (open + closed) on a slug today, a 4th entry attempt is rejected with session_slug_cap_exceeded reason.
Rejection format matches BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] pattern.
ruled_out: Ruled out: changes to MAX_TRADES_PER_MARKET behavior.
Ruled out: any dashboard, stream, or exit logic changes.
recommended_next_step: Manager review. If approved: cold restart with pyc clear activates this gate along with all prior patches.
